CustomField.description: what kind of SMS records the user will receive custom notifications for
CustomField.label: Allow Notifications For

value.fullName: Only incoming SMS from a Contact I own
value.label: Only incoming SMS from a Contact I own

value.fullName: Only incoming SMS from a Lead I own
value.label: Only incoming SMS from a Lead I own

value.fullName: Only incoming SMS from Contacts and Leads I own
value.label: Only incoming SMS from Contacts and Leads I own

value.fullName: Do not show any SMS notifications
value.label: Do not show any SMS notifications
